name: screen-paint0r
description: Draw on your screen with global shortcuts

scripts.start: node build.mjs && node generate-icons.mjs && cp assets/icon.png dist/tray-icon.png && npx electron .
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run icons && cp assets/icon.png dist/tray-icon.png && npx electron-packager . "Screen Paint0r" --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=release --overwrite --ignore="(src|generate-icons|generate-icns|tsconfig|forge\.config|vite\.|assets|release|PKGBUILD|\.desktop$)" && cp assets/icon.icns "release/Screen Paint0r-darwin-arm64/Screen Paint0r.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns"
scripts.pack:linux: npm run build && npm run icons && npx electron-packager . "screen-paint0r" --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --icon=assets/icon.png --ignore="(src|generate-icons|generate-icns|tsconfig|forge\.config|vite\.|assets|release|PKGBUILD|\.desktop$)"
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack && npm run pack:linux
scripts.dmg: npm run pack && hdiutil create -volname "Screen Paint0r" -srcfolder "release/Screen Paint0r-darwin-arm64/Screen Paint0r.app" -ov -format UDZO "release/Screen-Paint0r-$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').dmg"
